title: CustomMace
description: Bored of the basic maces in minecraft, well this project makes the maces more enjoyable by adding custom abilities
body:
🪓The Eight Legendary Maces

Ancient power reawakened... now in your hands.

Forged from the heart of battle and the elements themselves, these 8 legendary maces each hold devastating active abilities and powerful passive enchantments. Bound to a Heavy Core, energized by a Breeze Rod, and shaped with rare mystical items, these are no ordinary weapons.

🧱 Crafting Your Destiny
Each mace is crafted like a normal Minecraft recipe, but can only be made once per mace per server, making each one a rare and coveted tool of destruction or defense.

To craft:

🧿 Obtain a Heavy Core with /givecore 1–8

🔩 Combine it with a Breeze Rod and specialty ingredients in a crafting table

⚠️ Only one of each mace can ever exist unless given manually

Want to skip the forge? Use /summonMace 1–8 to summon one directly.

🌪️ The Maces & Their Powers
Each mace has an active ability (triggered by Shift + Offhand use) and a unique passive effect to empower the wielder.

1. 💨 Breeze Mace
Active: Launches a blast of wind, knocking back enemies and lifting you upward

Passive: Light movement, mild levitation effect when sprinting in air

2. 🌀 End Mace
Active: Teleports you a short distance forward, bypassing obstacles

Passive: Slow falling and immunity to void damage when low on health

3. 🔥 Fire Mace
Active: Erupts a ring of flame around the player, igniting mobs and enemies

Passive: Fire Resistance and increased melee damage when burning

4. ❄️ Frozen Mace
Active: Freezes all mobs within 5 blocks, rooting them in place temporarily

Passive: Slows attackers and grants minor damage reduction when standing on ice

5. 👁 Warden Mace
Active: Fires a Warden-style sonic boom in a straight line, dealing massive damage

Passive: Permanent Strength I — true power comes with darkness

6. 🌊 Ocean Mace
Active: Sends a crashing tidal wave forward, pushing enemies and extinguishing fire

Passive: Grants Conduit Power and Dolphin’s Grace while underwater, plus Water Resistance

7. 💡 Light Mace
Active: Cobwebs another player’s head for 5 seconds, blinding and slowing them

Passive: Permanent Jump Boost — you feel... lighter than light

8. 🪨 Dense Mace
Active: Slam the ground to cause a shockwave, launching mobs nearby

Passive: Knockback Resistance and slower fall speed

⚙️ Cooldowns & Balance
To keep these godlike tools balanced:

Each ability has a unique cooldown, visible in the action bar

Cooldowns are tracked per-player to prevent spam or abuse

All maces use the same Shift + Offhand activation method — intuitive and sleek

🧭 How to Get Started
🔨 /givecore 1–8 – Get the crafting Heavy Core for each mace

✨ /summonMace 1–8 – Spawn a fully built mace instantly

🗺️ Explore custom recipes and hunt down exotic ingredients to forge your own legendary weapon

🎮 Compatible With:
Minecraft 1.21.1+

Spigot / Paper servers

Fully multiplayer-safe with tracking per player and unique item IDs

TO USE ABILITY SHIFT+OFFHAND

Join my discord for free giveaways
https://discord.gg/CYJhM75Zcd
